title: Multi‑brand Gift Card
description: What are the options, features, and management tools for a multi‑brand gift card service?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information about a versatile gift card solution that can be purchased, tracked, and used across many retailers and services. Relevant content should describe a multi‑brand or multi‑sign voucher platform (e.g., UpCadhoc, CADO), including how to buy a card, view balances, manage accounts, and the breadth of participating merchants. Documents that focus on general e‑gift cards from single retailers or unrelated promotional pages are not relevant.

title: Lamb Tagine
description: What is a traditional recipe and cooking method for a lamb tagine?
narrative: The user is looking for instructions to make a lamb tagine, including a list of ingredients, spices, preparation steps, and cooking tips. Relevant documents should describe a Moroccan‑style lamb tagine, provide a detailed recipe, and explain the cooking technique (e.g., low‑heat stewing in a tagine pot). Documents that only mention lamb dishes unrelated to tagine, or that focus on other cuts of lamb, are not relevant.

title: Lotus Car Details
description: What are the specifications, pricing, fuel consumption and emissions of Lotus automobiles such as the Elise?
narrative: The user wants factual information about Lotus brand vehicles, focusing on model names, market prices, technical specifications, fuel economy and CO2 emissions. Relevant documents should mention Lotus models (e.g., Elise) and provide quantitative detail on price, fuel use, emissions, or other specs. Documents that only list generic car advertisements, unrelated brands, or do not contain Lotus‑specific data are not relevant.

title: Veal Paupiettes Recipe
description: How can I prepare and cook veal paupiettes?

Relevant documents should present a clear, usable recipe for veal paupiettes, preferably in a format that a home cook can follow. Documents that merely mention the dish without providing full cooking details, or that are unrelated in content, are not relevant.

title: Car Sun Protection
description: What products or methods can be used to protect a vehicle’s interior and occupants from sunlight and UV radiation?
narrative: The user is seeking information about ways to shield a car from the sun, including UV‑blocking window films, sun visors, and other accessories that reduce heat, glare, and UV exposure while complying with legal limits. Relevant documents should describe automotive solar‑tint films, their UV‑blocking performance, installation kits, legal transmission requirements, and similar sun‑shield accessories. Documents that merely list unrelated automotive parts, cleaning tips, or generic sunscreen products are not relevant.

title: Petit Bateau
description: What is the French clothing brand Petit Bateau, whose name translates to “small vessel,” and what are its products and history?
narrative: The user is seeking information about the brand Petit Bateau – a French apparel company whose name literally means “small boat.” Relevant documents are those that describe the brand, its collections, history, and general product information. Pages that merely mention the brand in the context of gift‑cards, loyalty programs, or promotional checkout details are not relevant.

title: Renault Passenger Cars

Documents focusing on other manufacturers' collaborator programs or unrelated car brands are not relevant.

title: War School
description: What is the Graduate School of War (École de Guerre) and where can I find official information, courses, and publications about it?

Relevant documents are those that describe the school’s purpose, provide practical information such as enrollment, e‑book download instructions, contact addresses, and official website details. title: Option Right
description: What is the "right of option" at Pôle Emploi and how can a jobseeker use it?
narrative: The user is looking for a clear explanation of the right of option offered by Pôle Emploi, including its definition, eligibility requirements (e.g., minimum days/hours worked, time‑limits, type of contracts), the procedural steps to request it, the impact on unemployment benefits (amount and duration), and any relevant deadlines or consequences of choosing the option. Relevant documents are those that describe the right of option, its conditions, application process, and effects on benefit calculations.

title: AXA Client Space
description: How can I access and use the AXA client (customer) portal online?

title: Best Electric Car
description: Which electric cars offer the best overall value considering price, range, charging time, and available purchase incentives?
narrative: The user wants a comparative ranking of electric vehicle models that provide the highest overall value. The answer should compare several models (e.g., Citroën Ami, Renault Zoe, Peugeot e‑208, Hyundai Kona Electric, Porsche Taycan, etc.) and justify their placement in the ranking based on these criteria. Documents that only list parts, focus on a single make without broader comparison, or lack details on price, performance, or incentives are not relevant.

title: Potato Late Blight
description: What are the symptoms, causes, and management practices for late blight in potatoes?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive information about the fungal disease late blight that affects potatoes, including how to identify it on leaves and tubers, environmental conditions that promote it, and effective prevention and treatment strategies. Relevant documents should describe late blight symptoms (e.g., yellow then brown spots on foliage, tuber rot), explain that it is caused by a fungus, and provide control measures such as resistant varieties, crop rotation, and fungicide applications. Documents that only discuss potato varieties, general gardening techniques, or unrelated pest/disease topics are not relevant.

title: Heaven Earth Phrase
description: What is the origin and full text of the phrase “from heaven to dusky monic earth” as used in Monique Mathieu’s writings?
narrative: The user is looking for sources that contain or explain the specific phrase “from heaven to dusky monic earth,” which appears in the context of Monique Mathieu’s New‑Age material titled “From Heaven to Earth.” Relevant documents should explicitly include the phrase or discuss its meaning, attribution to Monique Mathieu, and related content from the ducielalaterre.org site or similar New‑Age portals. Documents that do not mention the phrase, Monique Mathieu, or the “From Heaven to Earth” context are not relevant.

title: Legacy Office Series

title: Return Work Bonus
description: What are the eligibility criteria, amount, and application procedure for the French return‑to‑work bonus?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive information about the "bonus de retour à l'emploi" (return‑to‑work bonus) in France. Relevant material should describe who can claim the bonus (e.g., RSA, SSA beneficiaries), the minimum employment duration and contract type required, the payable amount (typically €1,000), how often it can be received, and the steps to request it from Pôle Emploi or CAF. The narrative also expects clarification on whether the bonus is still in force or has been discontinued, and any special conditions such as required documentation or exceptions for short‑term contracts.
